comment: VSCO-2-CE Sus articulation = explicit no-vibrato. Source recorded
anechoically by Sam Gossner, Sam Burke (oboe). Sparse 3-per-octave
(D, F, A#) pattern across A#2-F5. v3 velocity (mf-ish). Default gates
expected to pass — these are clean professional samples, unlike the
soundfont-rendered MusyngKite oboe whose amplitude wobble required
loose gates and ultimately couldn't ship. transpose:0.5 because the
VSCO filename pitches are labeled an octave below the actual sounding
